Rule.name: six_sql_query

Argument.name: title
Argument.Description: Descriptive name for the query executed upon submitting this form (metaparameter)

Argument.name: maxClobSize
Argument.Description: Maximum number of characters to read from CLOBs ("maxClobSize" parameter). Default: 256

Argument.name: runInBackground
Argument.Description: Enable for long-running queries to get the result sent by email ("runInBackground" parameter)
